description: API endpoint patterns for the Enercare Fabric + Purview demo. All use managed identity / DefaultAzureCredential — no stored secrets.

authentication.note: Never hardcode client_secret. In GitHub Actions use OIDC + azure/login@v1 with client-id var (not secret).

list_workspaces.description: List all workspaces the caller has access to

upload_table_parquet.description: Load a Parquet file from Lakehouse Files into a Lakehouse Delta table

get_semantic_model_definition.description: Fetch full TMDL of semantic model — use to read before write-back

update_semantic_model_definition.description: Write updated TMDL back to semantic model — this is the no-VM alternative to TOM/XMLA
update_semantic_model_definition.note: Requires updateMetadata=true query param. Payload is full TMDL parts array.

run_notebook.description: Trigger a Fabric notebook run via API

execute_dax_query.description: Execute a DAX query against a semantic model — used by close_loop.py to verify KPI values

register_type_defs.description: Register custom entity types, enum defs, business metadata defs from purview-type-defs.json

bulk_upsert_entities.description: Register or update multiple data assets (tables, columns) in one call. Max 100 entities per batch.

partial_update_entity.description: Update a single attribute on an existing entity without replacing the whole entity

create_relationship.description: Create a lineage relationship between two entities (e.g., process → input/output tables)

write_back_insight.description: Write an AI-generated insight annotation as business metadata on an existing asset — this closes the loop

body_example.AIInstruction: 41% of PP non-renewals in Q1 followed a billing queue call. Linked to invoice_date ambiguity across ZUORA/NS/CLARIFY.

create_glossary_term.description: Create a new business glossary term from a KPI definition

link_term_to_entity.description: Associate a glossary term with a data asset (table or column)

trigger_scan.description: Trigger a Purview scan on the registered Fabric data source

qualified_name_patterns.note: Use these patterns consistently so lineage edges connect correctly

sempy_labs.description: semantic-link-labs TOM write-back — the no-VM alternative Christopher asked about. Enable XMLA endpoint on Fabric capacity first.

key_functions.add_ai_instructions: labs.set_semantic_model_storage_format(dataset=...) — then patch TMDL via Items API for AI instructions
key_functions.note: For AI instructions and verified answers, use the Fabric Items REST API TMDL approach — sempy_labs handles column/measure descriptions; Items API handles the full AI configuration.
